# Anthropic Developer Documentation

This file provides an overview of the Anthropic API documentation and developer resources.

## Root URL

Claude Developer Platform Console (Requires login)

https://platform.claude.com

## Available Languages on Website

The full documentation is available in the following languages on https://platform.claude.com/docs:

- English (en) - 541 pages - /docs - Content included below
- German (Deutsch) (de) - 196 pages - /docs/de - Visit website for content
- Spanish (Español) (es) - 196 pages - /docs/es - Visit website for content
- French (Français) (fr) - 196 pages - /docs/fr - Visit website for content
- Italian (Italiano) (it) - 196 pages - /docs/it - Visit website for content
- Japanese (日本語) (ja) - 196 pages - /docs/ja - Visit website for content
- Korean (한국어) (ko) - 196 pages - /docs/ko - Visit website for content
- Portuguese (Português) (pt-BR) - 196 pages - /docs/pt-BR - Visit website for content
- Russian (Русский) (ru) - 196 pages - /docs/ru - Visit website for content
- Chinese Simplified (简体中文) (zh-CN) - 196 pages - /docs/zh-CN - Visit website for content
- Chinese Traditional (繁體中文) (zh-TW) - 196 pages - /docs/zh-TW - Visit website for content
- Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia) (id) - 196 pages - /docs/id - Visit website for content

---

## English

- [Versions](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/versioning.md)
